ocr_findings.description: OCR inserts a standalone line 'イーアールピー' (the furigana reading for ERP) as a separate paragraph between the '# ERP' heading and the body text. In the image this is small ruby text above the ERP acronym heading, not a standalone block. Content is not lost but the furigana is rendered as body text noise.

reviewer_notes: Page covers 経営管理システム introduction and the ERP section. The 試験にはコレが出る！ callout box with the four 一元管理 systems (ERP/CRM/SFA/SCM) is correctly captured as a bullet list. All body paragraphs are faithfully reproduced. The furigana 'イーアールピー' is rendered as a standalone line rather than inline ruby text — a cosmetic low-severity issue only.
